name: Rod of Negation
description:
This long, plain, leaden rod can disrupt magic.

Activate 2 Interact

Effect This rod emits a thin, gray beam that negates a spell or magic item, casting a 6th-rank spell with a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+23]]. Once activated, the rod can't be activated again for [[/r 2d6]] hours.
